markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Matthew Alves-Hill to the N-able account.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Repositioning:** N-able is shifting from an MSP focus to a "cyber resilience" provider, centered on the newly acquired AdLumen MDR product.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**New Review Process:** A new 2-step PMM → Editorial review process was implemented to ensure product accuracy after initial drafts were flagged as inaccurate.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**Gated Assets:** Per the contract, gated assets will be created by repurposing existing N-able content, replacing 1–2 standard articles each.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Production Reset:** All 6–7 completed drafts are now "In Production" and must be revised to meet the new PMM review standards before publishing can begin.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)

## Topics

### Account Context & Strategy

  - [**Client:** N-able, a cybersecurity company.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** Repositioning from an MSP-focused vendor to a "cyber resilience" provider.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**Growth Driver:** The newly acquired AdLumen MDR product, which enables a full suite of services: prevention, detection, response, and restoration.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create SEO content that supports the new brand positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [**Focus:** How-to guides, listicles, and thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Exclusion:** Foundational "what is" content, which belongs in N-able's internal "cyber encyclopedia."](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Process:** Before writing, Google the primary keyword with `site:enable.com` to check for existing content to refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

### New Review & Production Process

  - [**Problem:** Initial drafts were flagged as inaccurate by N-able's Product Marketing Managers (PMMs).](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new 2-step review process was implemented to ensure product accuracy before editorial review.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**New Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
    1.  [**PMM Review:** Drafts are routed to the relevant PMM based on the `Product Focus` field in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
    2.  [**Editorial Review:** After PMM feedback is addressed, the draft moves to Elaine for stylistic review.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
    3.  [**Publishing:** N-able publishes the final article (no CMS access for GrowthX).](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [**Airtable Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [PMMs now have editing access to comment on topics.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
      - [A `Product Focus` field was added to route drafts correctly.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [A `Brief Description` (generated by Claude) now precedes each topic to give PMMs context.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Gated Assets

  - [**Requirement:** Gated assets are a contractual deliverable, replacing 1–2 standard articles each.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [Repurpose content from N-able's existing reports (e.g., Annual Threat Report).](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [Create a \~2,000-word asset (standard article length) from extracted chapters.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Design:** Katya will design the asset.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
      - [**Approval:** The first asset's outline is approved; it now requires PMM input on where to mention N-able solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)

### Production & Communication

  - [**Production Status:** No articles have been published. All 6–7 completed drafts are now "In Production" and require revision to meet the new PMM review standards.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [**Communication:** N-able is an email-only client (no Slack). They are responsive, and this has not caused delays.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [**Image Workflow:** Lawrence will select images from the shared N-able image folder. Katya is merging this workflow into the main agentic pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Lawrence:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [Revise all 6–7 "In Production" drafts to meet new PMM standards.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [For the "Enterprise Patch Management Best Practices Guide," write it as a listicle.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [Select an image from the shared folder for each final draft.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [Share the gated asset outline with N-able's PMM team for input.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [Follow up with Katya to merge the N-able image workflow into the main pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
      - [Onboard to the N-able account by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [Schedule a formal introduction with the N-able team for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/k4JvhkCzZzVrP8y3KrfSXdZvuRqwVCry?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
